SEARCH
Module runtime
Package runtime

Interface CommandRunner

All Known Implementing Classes:
Demo_1
public interface CommandRunner
Interface CommandRunner defines the API of a utility that can split command line arguments by key-words ("commands") into several invocations of the run(String command, KVArgs args) method on a single instance of a class that implements the CommandRunner interface.

Invocations are represented as CommandRunner.CommandRunnerInstance instances.

Each invocation receives pre-processed arguments as a CommandRunner.KVArgs object.

The CommandRunner utility was adapted from Spring Boot's CommandLineRunner.java interface.

Version:
"1.0.0-SNAPSHOT"
Author:
"sgraupner"

  • Nested Class Summary

    Nested Classes
    Modifier and Type
    Interface
    Description
    static final record 
    CommandRunner.CommandRunnerInstance
    Record CommandRunner.CommandRunnerInstance represents one invocation of the run(String command, KVArgs args) method on a single instance of a class that implements the CommandRunner interface.
    static interface 
    CommandRunner.KVArgs
    Interface CommandRunner.KVArgs provides access to typed key-value arguments converted from bare String[] args command line arguments.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static List<CommandRunner.CommandRunnerInstance>
    create(CommandRunner runner, String commands, String[] args)
    Return a list of command runner instances by splitting raw args[] by comma-separated words ("commands") in the commands argument.
    void
    run(String command, CommandRunner.KVArgs args)
    Method invoked for a command with key-value arguments.
    static void
    run(CommandRunner runner, String commands, String[] args)
    Split and run command runner instances by invoking method run(String command, KVArgs args) on each created instance.

  • Method Details

    • create

      static List<CommandRunner.CommandRunnerInstance> create(CommandRunner runner, String commands, String[] args)
      Return a list of command runner instances by splitting raw args[] by comma-separated words ("commands") in the commands argument.
      Parameters:
      runner - the command runner instance on which the command run is performed.
      commands - comma-separated words to split args[].
      args - raw command line arguments to split and convert into key-value arguments for each command.
      Returns:
      list of command runner instances.

    • run

      static void run(CommandRunner runner, String commands, String[] args)
      Split and run command runner instances by invoking method run(String command, KVArgs args) on each created instance.
      Parameters:
      runner - the command runner instance on which the command run is performed.
      commands - comma-separated words to split args[].
      args - raw command line arguments.

    • run

      void run(String command, CommandRunner.KVArgs args)
      Method invoked for a command with key-value arguments.
      Parameters:
      command - the command string.
      args - the key-value arguments for the command.
